_comment: Visual QA Report Template — Generated by 07-quality-and-verification + 07/completeness-verification. Populated by GPT-4o vision after screenshots at all 6 breakpoints. Each page is tested, each breakpoint is inspected, issues are cataloged for fix.
_usage: After deploy, Playwright screenshots every page at 6 widths. GPT-4o vision inspects each screenshot. This report captures findings. Loop: fix issues -> re-screenshot -> re-inspect -> until zero issues.

issues.category: layout | typography | spacing | overflow | contrast | broken-image | missing-content | interaction | animation
issues.description: Hero text overflows container on iPhone SE width
issues.expected: Text wraps within viewport without horizontal scroll
issues.actual: Text extends 40px beyond right edge, causing horizontal scroll
issues.fix_suggestion: Reduce font-size at 375px breakpoint or add overflow-wrap: break-word

results.ai_notes: Overall layout is good. Navigation hamburger menu is properly positioned. Images are appropriately sized for mobile.
Clean tablet layout. Grid switches from 1-column to 2-column correctly.
Full desktop layout renders correctly. All sections visible and well-spaced.
Max-width container properly centered. No stretching.

violations.description: Elements must have sufficient color contrast
